migration_checklist: 1. Run blast radius query: check contract_registry/subscriptions.yaml for all subscribers
2. Notify all breaking_fields subscribers via contact email in registry
3. Create migration branch — do NOT merge to main until all consumers updated
4. Fix: Coordinate with all producers. Provide default or migration script. Block deploy until all producers updated.
5. Fix: Two-sprint deprecation minimum. Each registry subscriber must acknowledge removal.
6. Re-run ValidationRunner on clean data to re-establish baselines
7. Update schema_snapshots/ after migration is complete
reports.rollback_plan: Revert to previous snapshot version by restoring the prior schema_snapshots/week5-event-records/20260401_203807.yaml. Re-run ContractGenerator on the last known good data file. Notify all subscribers of the rollback via registry contacts.
reports.recommendation: BLOCK DEPLOY — 2 breaking change(s) detected. Complete migration checklist before merging.
